name: Upstash
description: Upstash is a serverless Redis and Kafka platform. Use this API to execute Redis commands over HTTP, manage databases, and work with serverless data stores without managing infrastructure.

capabilities.name: execute_redis_command
capabilities.description: Execute any Redis command over HTTP against your Upstash Redis database.

capabilities.name: manage_redis_databases
capabilities.description: Create, list, get details, and delete serverless Redis databases.

capabilities.name: manage_kafka_topics
capabilities.description: Create, list, and manage Kafka topics in your Upstash Kafka cluster.

capabilities.name: manage_kafka_clusters
capabilities.description: Create, list, and delete serverless Kafka clusters.
